title: Palm Beach International Boat Show
address: 101 S Flagler Dr, West Palm Beach, FL 33401
shortWhy: Culture at Flagler Drive Waterfront, West Palm Beach.
editorialWhy: Palm Beach International Boat Show — $1.2 billion+ in yachts from inflatables to 90m superyachts. 55,000+ visitors expected. GA and VIP (Windward Experience with premium open bar). Outdoors at Flagler Drive Waterfront in West Palm Beach. Tickets from $35.

shortWhy: Flagler Museum live at Flagler Museum.
